revision.comment: Parser functions link has moved from meta to mediawiki (invalidate ~1500 transclusions)
revision.text:
'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''
You are encouraged to familiarise yourself with its setup and [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions|parser functions]] before editing the template. If your edit causes unexpected problems, please [[Help:Reverting#Undo|undo]] it quickly, as this template may appear on a large number of pages.
You can conduct experiments, and should test all major changes, in either [[{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Sandbox|/Sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/test sandbox|/test sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Test sandbox|/Test sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/test|/test|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Test|/Test|/sandbox}}}}}}}}}}|this template's sandbox]], the [[Template:Template sandbox|general template sandbox]], or your user space before changing anything here.

'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''
You are encouraged to familiarise yourself with its setup and [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions|parser functions]] before editing the template. If your edit causes unexpected problems, please [[Help:Reverting#Undo|undo]] it quickly, as this template may appear on a large number of pages.
You can conduct experiments, and should test all major changes, in either [[{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Sandbox|/Sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/test sandbox|/test sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Test sandbox|/Test sandbox|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/test|/test|{{#ifexist:{{FULLPAGENAME}}/Test|/Test|/sandbox}}}}}}}}}}|this template's sandbox]], the [[Template:Template sandbox|general template sandbox]], or your user space before changing anything here.

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''
You are encouraged to familiarise yourself with its setup and [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions|parser functions]] before editing the template. If your edit causes unexpected problems, please [[Help:Reverting#Undo|undo]] it quickly, as this template may appear on a large number of pages.

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''
You are encouraged to familiarise yourself with its setup and [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions|parser functions]] before editing the template. If your edit causes unexpected problems, please [[Help:Reverting#Undo|undo]] it quickly, as this template may appear on a large number of pages.

[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
'''This {{SUBJECTSPACE formatted}} employs intricate features of template syntax.'''
You are encouraged to familiarise yourself with its setup and [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions|parser functions]] before editing the template. If your edit causes unexpected problems, please [[Help:Reverting#Undo|undo]] it quickly, as this template may appear on a large number of pages.

[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
